tieude: THE EXPERT COURSE “RESEARCH METHODOLOGY AND SCIENTIFIC PUBLICATION”
mieutangan: Commencement date: December 16, 2024
mieutachitiet: Phuong Nam Institute respectfully informs about the organization of the expert course “Research Methodology and Scientific Publication”, primarily conducted by Prof. Tuan V Nguyen, one of the world’s top 1% of experts in the field of Medicine.
mieutaseo: Research Methodology and Scientific Publication, Prof. Dr. Nguyen Van Tuan
tukhoa: Sciencetific Research Methodologies and International Publication, Sciencetific Research Methodologies, International Publication, Methodologies, Sciencetific Research, Researcher, International Publication, Expert, Prof. Nguyen Van Tuan, Prof. Dr. Nguyen Van Tuan, Nguyen Van Tuan is a Distinguished Professor at the University of Technology Sydney,
c1:
The main objective of the course is to equip participants with the necessary skills and knowledge for designing scientific research. Additionally, the course will guide participants on how to prepare and publish scientific articles in international journals.

   Upon successful completion of this course, Phuong Nam Institute expects participants to:

  • Be able to formulate and evaluate research questions;
  • Design questionnaires for data collection;
  • Develop a research proposal;
  • Understand data analysis principles;
  • Comprehend the IMRaD structure of a scientific article;
  • Understand the principles of writing the Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion sections, and how to title an article;
  • Be able to create charts and tables for scientific articles;
  • Familiarize themselves with scientific writing and the use of English in scientific research;
  • Learn how to utilize ChatGPT for editing scientific articles;
  • Differentiate between reputable and predatory journals.
c2: This course is designed for scientists, researchers, lecturers, PhD students, postgraduates, and undergraduates passionate about scientific research who wish to conduct research and publish in international journals.
c3:
1. Prof. Tuan V Nguyen (Principal Lecturer)

Prof. Tuan V Nguyen is a Distinguished Professor at the University of Technology Sydney (Australia), Director of the Centre for Health Technologies at the University of Technology Sydney, and the first Vietnamese to become a member of the Australian Academy of Health and Medical Sciences. Prof. Nguyen is one of the few Vietnamese experts abroad ranked among the top 1% of global experts, with over 300 WoS (ISI) publications and numerous articles published in prestigious international journals such as Nature, Science, Lancet, New England Journal of Medicine, JAMA, etc.

 Homepage of Prof. Tuan V Nguyen at UTS: link 

2. Dr. Thach S Tran

Dr. Thach S Tran is a lecturer at the University of Technology Sydney (Australia), with over 15 years of experience in research design and data analysis. He has published 68 peer-reviewed original publications and 3 systematic reviews in the top peer-reviewed journals such as The N Engl J Med, Lancet, Lancet Child & Adolescent Health, JAMA, JAMA Netw Open, PLoS Med, Eur Respir J, J Bone Miner Res, J Clin Endocrinol Metab, Clin Chem, and Diabetes Care. Within the last 5 years, he published 45 original papers and 1 Cochrane review.
c4:
1. Time:

  • Commencement date: 8:00 AM, December 16, 2024 (Monday)
  • Course length: 7 days (from Dec 16, 2024 to Dec 22, 2024)
  • Main learning format: In-person; online support available for those in need.
  • Class Schedule:
    • Morning     : 8:00 AM - 11:30 AM
    • Afternoon   : 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM

2. Expected Venue:

Phuong Nam Institute of Social Resource Development

45 Dinh Tien Hoang, Saigon Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
c5:

1. Part 1: Research Design

  • Lecture 1: Scientific Research Procedures
  • Lecture 2: Research Questions
  • Lecture 3: Research Models: Experimental 
  • Lecture 4: Research Models: Observational 
  • Lecture 5: Research Proposal

2. Part 2: Writing Scientific Articles and International Publication

  • Lecture 16: Writing a Methods Section
  • Lecture 17: Creating tables and figures
  • Lecture 18: Writing a Results Section
  • Lecture 19: Writing a Discussion Section
  • Lecture 20: Utilizing ChatGPT
  • Lecture 21: Responding to peer reviewers

  • Critically appraise scientific evidence from clinical trials
  • Interpret the results of clinical research
  • Estimate sample size for a clinical study

tieudeseo: THE EXPERT COURSE "RESEARCH DESIGN AND SCIENTIFIC PUBLICATION"
mieutangan: Commencement date: August 18, 2025
mieutachitiet:
To contribute to the implementation of Resolution No. 57-NQ/TW on breakthroughs in the development of science, technology, innovation, and national digital transformation - which includes tasks and solutions related to the development and strategic employment of high-quality human resources and talents to meet the demands of scientific, technological, and digital advancement; in line with the 2025 Activity Plan of the Phuong Nam Institute on training and capacity building, we respectfully inform about the organization of the expert course "Research Design and Scientific Publication", primarily conducted by Prof. Tuan V Nguyen, one of the world’s top 1% of medical experts.

The course is designed to enhance scientific research capacity for researchers and lecturers, from developing research ideas to conducting studies and writing scientific papers. The program focuses on standardizing the research process, enhancing scientific quality, minimizing bias, and ensuring the reliability of results. An important objective of the course is to equip participants with the skills to meet international standards, from manuscript writing to responding to peer reviewers, in order to improve their chances of publishing in reputable journals.

tieude: THE TRAINING COURSE "MASTERING EVIDENCE-BASED MEDICINE: CRITICAL APPRAISAL AND APPLICATION"
tieudeseo: the training course mastering evidence based medicine critical appraisal and application
mieutachitiet:
Phuong Nam Institute in collaboration with Binh Dinh General Hospital respectfully informs about the training course titled “Mastering Evidence-Based Medicine: Critical Appraisal and Application” conducted by Professor Tuan V Nguyen (one of the world’s top 1% experts in the field of Medicine).

In the context of increasingly evidence-based medical practice, the ability to access, analyze and apply medical evidence has become an essential requirement for healthcare professionals. However, assessing research quality, correctly interpreting statistical results and appropriately applying them to patient care remain major challenges for many healthcare facilities. The training course titled “Mastering Evidence-Based Medicine: Critical Appraisal and Application” was designed to meet this urgent need, helping participants master foundational knowledge of evidence-based medicine and develop critical thinking skills in clinical practice.
mieutaseo: the training course mastering evidence based medicine critical appraisal and application

c1:

+ Fundamental knowledge of evidence-based medicine and the role of evidence in treatment decision-making;

+ Systematic literature search skills using PICOT;

+ Ability to differentiate and understand various clinical study designs;

+ Skills in assessing risk of bias and confounding factors in research;

+ Skills to interpret research results, including p-values, confidence intervals, absolute differences, odds ratios, risk ratios, and diagnostic indices;

+ Understanding and application of the QALY concept (Quality-Adjusted Life Years) in evaluating the effectiveness of medical interventions;

+ Foundational knowledge of sample size estimation in clinical research.
c2: The training course is designed for clinical physicians, resident doctors, and medical specialists; faculty members at medical and pharmaceutical universities; biomedical researchers; nurses and pharmacists; healthcare staff; and businesses in the biomedical sector interested in applying evidence-based medicine in practice and research.

mieutachitiet:
To contribute to the implementation of Resolution No. 57-NQ/TW on breakthroughs in the development of science, technology, innovation, and national digital transformation - which includes tasks and solutions related to the development and strategic employment of high-quality human resources and talents to meet the demands of scientific, technological, and digital advancement, Phuong Nam Institute respectfully informs about the organization of the expert course "Applications of AI in Data Analysis", primarily conducted by Prof. Tuan V Nguyen, world’s top 0.05% of scholars in the specialties of osteoporosis, bone density, and bone mineral (according to ScholarGPS, 2025).

The main course objective is to equip participants with essential statistical methods for scientific data analysis. Participants will practice techniques for comparing differences between two groups of variables; Correlation analysis; Building and testing regression models; in particular, methods such as Meta-analysis, Propensity Score, Mendelian Randomization, and the applications of AI in data analysis.

c2: The course participants are required to have knowledge of the experimental research process and basic statistics (such as mean, median, standard deviation), but no prior knowledge of R is necessary.
c3:
1. Prof Tuan V Nguyen

Prof. Tuan V Nguyen is a Leadership Fellow of the National Health and Medical Research Council and Distinguished Professor of Predictive Medicine of the University of Technology Sydney (UTS); He also holds an Adjunct Professorship at the University of New South Wales (Sydney, Australia). In addition, he is a distinguished authority in the fields of osteoporosis and genetics. Currently, Professor Nguyen is ranked among the top 0.05% of scholars worldwide in the specialties of osteoporosis, bone density, and bone mineral (according to ScholarGPS, 2025).

Prof. Nguyen has published over 350 peer-reviewed original publications, review articles, book chapters, and commentaries or editorials, largely from his current research interests. His work has been published in the highest impact journals in the field, notably the Journal of Bone and Mineral Research and the Journal of Clinical Endocrinology and Metabolism. A number of key papers are published in more general journals, including New England Journal of Medicine, Lancet, JAMA, BMJ, Nature, Nature Genetics, PNAS, eLife. Some papers are considered pioneering in the field and have received applauded commentaries. He also serves as a peer reviewer for more than 20 medical journals, including Nature, Lancet, BMJ, JAMA, New England Journal of Medicine, Annals of Internal Medicine; a consultant for global pharmaceutical corporations; and a PhD thesis examiner for universities in the United States, Finland, the Netherlands, France, the United Kingdom, Canada, and Australia…

Profile page of Prof. Tuan V Nguyen at UTS: Profile page

2. Dr. Thach S Tran

Dr. Thach S Tran is a Senior Research Officer at the Garvan Institute of Medical Research, with 20+ years of experience in experimental design and data analysis, including analysing large randomised controlled trials data, modelling complex longitudinal, time-series and correlated data, developing and validating prediction models, analysing linked health data and managing large and complex datasets. He is an author/co-author of 80 peer-reviewed original publications, 3 systematic reviews and 1 invited commentary in the top peer-reviewed journals, such as The New England Journal of Medicine, Lancet, Lancet Child Adolescent Health, JAMA, JAMA Network Open, PLoS Medicine, European Respiratory Journal, Journal of Bone and Mineral Research, Journal of Clinical Endocrinology and Metabolism, Clinical Chemistry, and Diabetes Care. He is a member of the Editorial Board of the J Bone Miner Res and the Statistical Reviewer Board of the J Clin Endocrinol Metab. He published more than 50 original papers within the last 5 years.

tieude: THE EXPERT COURSE "RESEARCH DESIGN AND ETHICS"
mieutangan: Commencement date: January 23, 2026 (Friday)
mieutachitiet:
Pursuant to Resolution No. 57-NQ/TW on breakthroughs in the development of science, technology, innovation, and national digital transformation, policies on international cooperation and technology transfer have been successively promulgated. These policies have indirectly promoted the dissemination of research outcomes, particularly publications in reputable international journals. Many young researchers have become caught in a spiral of pursuing publication quantity, choosing simplistic research topics of low quality, or even of no real value. In addition, a number of recent cases involving violations of research ethics have prompted society to reassess the issue and to raise the question that research must comply with standards of research ethics.

Phuong Nam Institute respectfully announces to esteemed organizations, institutions, and participants the organization of the expert course “Research Design and Ethics”, which is delivered directly by Prof. Tuan V Nguyen, world’s top 0.05% of scholars in the specialties of osteoporosis, bone density, and bone mineral (according to ScholarGPS, 2025).
c1:
The primary objective of the course is to equip participants with the ability to independently design sound, high-quality research from the outset, while fostering a strong and sustainable sense of research ethics, so that scientific inquiry is pursued not merely for incentives or academic credentials, but for the genuine value of knowledge itself.

Phuong Nam Institute expects that upon completion of the course, participants will: 

- Confidently develop a research project, from formulating research questions to selecting appropriate study designs, determining sample size, and conducting proper data analysis;

- Identify and control common sources of bias, avoiding errors that may lead to manuscript rejection or retraction;

- Clearly understand ethical principles throughout the research and publication process, and know how to avoid predatory journals and research misconduct.
c2:
The course is designed for:

- Master’s students, doctoral students (PhD candidates) in health sciences, natural sciences, social sciences, economics, etc.;

- Early-career lecturers and researchers at universities, healthcare institutions, and research institutes;

- Physicians, pharmacists, and nurses who wish to conduct clinical or epidemiological research;

- Science administrators and members of research ethics committees seeking a deeper understanding of research design and research ethics.
c3:
1. Prof Tuan V Nguyen

Prof. Tuan V Nguyen is a Leadership Fellow of the National Health and Medical Research Council and Distinguished Professor of Predictive Medicine of the University of Technology Sydney (UTS); He also holds an Adjunct Professorship at the University of New South Wales (Sydney, Australia). In addition, he is a distinguished authority in the fields of osteoporosis and genetics. Currently, Professor Nguyen is ranked among the top 0.05% of scholars worldwide in the specialities of osteoporosis, bone density, and bone mineral (according to ScholarGPS, 2025).

Prof. Nguyen has published over 350 peer-reviewed original publications, review articles, book chapters, and commentaries or editorials, largely from his current research interests. His work has been published in the highest impact journals in the field, notably the Journal of Bone and Mineral Research and the Journal of Clinical Endocrinology and Metabolism. A number of key papers are published in more general journals, including New England Journal of Medicine, Lancet, JAMA, BMJ, Nature, Nature Genetics, PNAS, eLife. Some papers are considered pioneering in the field and have received applauded commentaries. He also serves as a peer reviewer for more than 20 medical journals, including Nature, Lancet, BMJ, JAMA, New England Journal of Medicine, Annals of Internal Medicine; a consultant for global pharmaceutical corporations; and a PhD thesis examiner for universities in the United States, Finland, the Netherlands, France, the United Kingdom, Canada, and Australia…

Profile page of Prof. Tuan V Nguyen at UTS: Profile page

2. Dr. Thach S Tran

Dr. Thach S Tran is a Senior Research Officer at the Garvan Institute of Medical Research, with 20+ years of experience in experimental design and data analysis, including analysing large randomised controlled trials data, modelling complex longitudinal, time-series and correlated data, developing and validating prediction models, analysing linked health data and managing large and complex datasets. He is an author/co-author of 80 peer-reviewed original publications, 3 systematic reviews and 1 invited commentary in the top peer-reviewed journals, such as The New England Journal of Medicine, Lancet, Lancet Child Adolescent Health, JAMA, JAMA Network Open, PLoS Medicine, European Respiratory Journal, Journal of Bone and Mineral Research, Journal of Clinical Endocrinology and Metabolism, Clinical Chemistry, and Diabetes Care. He is a member of the Editorial Board of the J Bone Miner Res and the Statistical Reviewer Board of the J Clin Endocrinol Metab. He published more than 50 original papers within the last 5 years.
